author: y4rr
content: 10/10 optimizer configs PASS at f32 noise (~1.5e-7 worst max_abs, cosine_sim=1.0). REAL BUG fixed: ferrotorch-optim RMSprop had eps INSIDE sqrt (sqrt(square_avg + eps)); torch.optim has eps OUTSIDE sqrt (sqrt(square_avg) + eps). Diverges significantly on first step when square_avg=0. Both foreach + legacy paths fixed; centered variant also corrected. Pinned trajectories at ferrotorch/optimizer-trajectories-v1.
